---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the prep app.
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> Half-baked ideas are better discussed in [Discussions](https://github.com/fmanimashaun/kcna-prep-app/discussions). Open an issue once it's a concrete proposal.

## The problem

What's missing or awkward today? A specific scenario is more useful than a generic complaint.

## What you'd like

A clear description of the change. If it's a UI tweak, a quick sketch / annotated screenshot helps a lot.

## Alternatives considered

Why not just X or Y? (Often there's a reason something works the way it does — calling out the alternatives keeps the PR discussion focused.)

## Scope check

- [ ] This change preserves the **fork-in-5-minutes** workflow (no hard-coded URLs, no required server, no required token beyond the existing optional Gist sync).
- [ ] It doesn't degrade answer correctness or rely on a specific person's data.
